mode.title: Scrape Mode
mode.description: daily = new notices since last run; historical = last 12 months

counties.title: Counties
counties.description: Counties to scrape. Leave empty for all (Knox + Blount).

types.title: Notice Types
types.description: Notice types to scrape. Currently only foreclosure is supported.

since_date.title: Since Date
since_date.description: Pull notices published on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides mode-based date logic.

start_page.title: Start Page
start_page.description: Page number to start scraping from (default 1). Use to resume a previous run without re-scraping earlier pages.

tn_username.title: tnpublicnotice.com Email
tn_username.description: Login email for tnpublicnotice.com Smart Search

captcha_api_key.title: 2Captcha API Key
captcha_api_key.description: API key from 2captcha.com for reCAPTCHA solving

use_residential_proxy.title: Use Residential Proxy
use_residential_proxy.description: Route requests through Apify residential proxies to avoid IP blocks.

google_drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive Folder ID
google_drive_folder_id.description: Google Drive folder ID for CSV upload. Leave empty to skip Drive upload.

google_service_account_key.title: Google Service Account Key (base64)
google_service_account_key.description: Base64-encoded JSON key for the Google service account. Required if google_drive_folder_id is set.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: API key for Claude Haiku LLM parsing. When set, notices that fail regex parsing are sent to Claude for structured extraction. Optional but recommended.

smarty_auth_id.title: Smarty Auth ID
smarty_auth_id.description: Auth ID from smarty.com for USPS address standardization. When set (with auth token), addresses are batch-standardized with geocoding, vacancy detection, and ZIP+4. Optional.

smarty_auth_token.title: Smarty Auth Token
smarty_auth_token.description: Auth token from smarty.com (paired with Auth ID). Required if smarty_auth_id is set.

openwebninja_api_key.title: OpenWeb Ninja API Key (Zillow Enrichment)
openwebninja_api_key.description: API key from openwebninja.com for the Real-Time Zillow Data API. Enriches properties with MLS status, Zestimate, equity estimate, and property type. Free tier: 100 requests/month. Optional.

serper_api_key.title: Serper.dev API Key
serper_api_key.description: API key from serper.dev for Google Search. Used for DM address lookup via people search sites. Free tier: 2,500 queries. Optional.

firecrawl_api_key.title: Firecrawl API Key
firecrawl_api_key.description: API key from firecrawl.dev for JS-rendered page scraping. Used for DM address extraction from people search sites. Free tier: 500 pages. Optional.

tracerfy_api_key.title: Tracerfy API Key
tracerfy_api_key.description: API key from tracerfy.com for skip tracing. Provides guaranteed DM mailing addresses at $0.02/record. Optional.

trestle_api_key.title: Trestle API Key
trestle_api_key.description: API key from trestleiq.com for phone validation scoring. Assigns 5-tier dial priority to phone numbers. Optional.

datasift_email.title: DataSift Email
datasift_email.description: Login email for DataSift.ai (app.reisift.io). Required for automatic CRM upload after scraping.

datasift_password.title: DataSift Password
datasift_password.description: Login password for DataSift.ai. Required for automatic CRM upload.

slack_webhook_url.title: Slack/Discord Webhook URL
slack_webhook_url.description: Webhook URL for run summary notifications. Works with Slack incoming webhooks or Discord /slack endpoints. Optional.

upload_datasift.title: Upload to DataSift
upload_datasift.description: Automatically upload enriched records to DataSift.ai CRM after scraping. Requires datasift_email and datasift_password.

enrich_datasift.title: Enrich in DataSift
enrich_datasift.description: Run DataSift's Enrich Property Information (SiftMap) after upload. Adds beds, baths, Zestimate, etc.

skip_trace_datasift.title: Skip Trace in DataSift
skip_trace_datasift.description: Run DataSift's built-in Skip Trace after upload. Pulls phone numbers and emails via unlimited plan.

run_tracerfy.title: Run Tracerfy Skip Trace (deep prospecting)
run_tracerfy.description: Run Tracerfy batch skip trace on deep-prospecting candidates. Only fires when Resolve Heirs is on. Leave OFF for the lean daily upload. Requires tracerfy_api_key.

notify_slack.title: Send Slack Notification
notify_slack.description: Send a run summary plus the per-record Sift upload package (details + notice screenshots) to Slack/Discord after the pipeline completes. Also sends error alerts on failure. Requires slack_webhook_url.

resolve_heirs.title: Resolve Heirs (deep prospecting)
resolve_heirs.description: Run obituary/deceased-owner detection and heir + decision-maker resolution during enrichment. OFF by default: the daily run uploads data + screenshots straight to DataSift, and deep prospecting is handled in a separate pipeline. Turn ON to deep-prospect inline. Requires anthropic_api_key.

include_vacant.title: Include Vacant Land
include_vacant.description: Keep vacant land parcels (no house number). Default OFF — turn ON if your buy box includes land deals.

include_commercial.title: Include Commercial Properties
include_commercial.description: Keep commercial properties (Smarty RDI = Commercial). Default OFF — turn ON if your buy box includes commercial.

include_entities.title: Include Entity-Owned Properties
include_entities.description: Keep LLC/Corp/Trust-owned records without filtering. Default OFF — entities are removed unless a person is found behind them.
